tasks.instruction: From the Help & Support section, open the FAQ about rescheduling or canceling a visit, follow its link to the contact form, choose the topic for rescheduling an existing booking, and send a detailed multi-sentence message with your name and email requesting a new date and time.

target_names: How do I reschedule or cancel a visit?
